name: Engineers’ Consortium
summary: Institution governing design, upkeep, and expansion of towers, spans, and major machines.
day_to_day: Assigns surveys, approves repairs, deploys crews, and manages structural maintenance.
who_works_there: Engineers, drafters, surveyors, crew chiefs, giant overseers.
who_uses_it: Regional leaders, extraction sites, tower administrators, transport networks.
authority: Can schedule disruptions, condemn unsafe structures, and prioritize engineering works.
public_manifestation: Survey markers, scaffold crews, closure notices, and visible repair gangs.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Expansion pressure competes with maintenance reality, making deferred repairs politically dangerous.
